subdomain.description: The unique subdomain Salesforce Marketing Cloud assigned to your account. Subdomains are tenant specific and should be a 28-character string starting with the letters "mc". Do not include the .rest.marketingcloudapis.com part of your subdomain URL. See more information on how to find your subdomain [here](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/marketing/marketing-cloud/guide/your-subdomain-tenant-specific-endpoints.html).
subdomain.label: Subdomain

account_id.description: Your Salesforce Marketing Cloud account identifier (or MID). See more information on how to find your MID [here](https://help.salesforce.com/s/articleView?id=sf.mc_overview_determine_your_marketing_cloud_instance.htm&type=5).
account_id.label: Account ID

client_id.description: Your Salesforce Marketing Cloud client ID. The client ID is issued when you create an API integration in [Installed Packages](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/marketing/marketing-cloud/guide/install-packages.html).
client_id.label: Client ID

client_secret.description: Your Salesforce Marketing Cloud client secret. The client secret is issued when you create an API integration in Installed Packages.
client_secret.label: Client Secret

oauth.description: Authorizes Segment to OAuth to the Destination API
oauth.label: OAuth

access-token.description: The (legacy) access token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

access_token.description: The access token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

appId.description: The App ID, retrieved via Destination API post-auth.

appName.description: The authorized user App, retrieved via Destination API on settings view load.

createdBy.description: Email address of segment user who connected OAuth.

displayName.description: The authorized user, retrieved via Destination API on settings view load.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token provided by Destination API after the OAuth handshake.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Create contacts in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

fields.label: Contact Key
fields.description: The unique identifier that you assign to a contact. This will be used to create a contact if one does not already exist with this Contact Key.

contactKey.title: Contact Key
contactKey.description: The unique identifier that you assign to a contact. This will be used to create a contact if one does not already exist with this Contact Key.

actions.name: Send API Event
actions.description: Send events into an existing Event Definition in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

fields.label: Event Definition Key
fields.description: The unique key for an event definition in Salesforce Marketing Cloud. The event defintion must be predefined in SFMC.

eventDefinitionKey.title: Event Definition Key
eventDefinitionKey.description: The unique key for an event definition in Salesforce Marketing Cloud. The event defintion must be predefined in SFMC.

fields.label: Contact Key
fields.description: The unique identifier that identifies a subscriber or a contact.

contactKey.title: Contact Key
contactKey.description: The unique identifier that identifies a subscriber or a contact.

fields.label: Event Data
fields.description: The properties of the event. Fields must be created in the event definition schema before sending data for it. On the left-hand side, input the SFMC field name exactly how it appears in the event definition schema. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the corresponding value.

data.title: Event Data
data.description: The properties of the event. Fields must be created in the event definition schema before sending data for it. On the left-hand side, input the SFMC field name exactly how it appears in the event definition schema. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the corresponding value.

actions.name: Send Contact to Data Extension
actions.description: Upsert contact data as rows into an existing data extension in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

fields.label: Data Extension Key
fields.description: The external key of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The external key is required if a Data Extension ID is not provided.

key.title: Data Extension Key
key.description: The external key of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The external key is required if a Data Extension ID is not provided.

fields.label: Data Extension ID
fields.description: The ID of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The ID is required if a Data Extension Key is not provided.

id.title: Data Extension ID
id.description: The ID of the data extension that you want to store information in. The data extension must be predefined in SFMC. The ID is required if a Data Extension Key is not provided.

fields.label: Data Extension Primary Key
fields.description: The Primary Key is a unique identifier for each row in the Data Extension. In the mapping configuration, enter the SFMC Key Name on the left and map the corresponding Segment Field on the right. Each Data Extension supports only one Primary Key. When data is sent to SFMC, the system will update an existing row if the Primary Key matches; otherwise, it will create a new record.

keys.title: Data Extension Primary Key
keys.description: The Primary Key is a unique identifier for each row in the Data Extension. In the mapping configuration, enter the SFMC Key Name on the left and map the corresponding Segment Field on the right. Each Data Extension supports only one Primary Key. When data is sent to SFMC, the system will update an existing row if the Primary Key matches; otherwise, it will create a new record.

contactKey.title: Contact Key
contactKey.description: The unique identifier that you assign to a contact. Contact Key must be a Primary Key in the data extension that contains contact information.

fields.label: Contact Fields
fields.description: The fields in the data extension that contain data about a contact, such as Email, Last Name, etc. Fields must be created in the data extension before sending data for it. On the left-hand side, input the SFMC field name exactly how it appears in the data extension. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the corresponding value.

values.title: Contact Fields
values.description: The fields in the data extension that contain data about a contact, such as Email, Last Name, etc. Fields must be created in the data extension before sending data for it. On the left-hand side, input the SFMC field name exactly how it appears in the data extension. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the corresponding value.

fields.label: Batch data to SFMC
fields.description: If true, data is batched before sending to the SFMC Data Extension.

enable_batching.title: Batch data to SFMC
enable_batching.description: If true, data is batched before sending to the SFMC Data Extension.

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

actions.name: Send Event asynchronously to Data Extension
actions.description:
Upsert event records asynchronously as rows into a data extension in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
  
    Note that Segment cannot provide real-time delivery confirmation or error tracking for events sent through this action- That will come in near future
